title: Footprint Analytics Wallet Profile
description: Schema for a comprehensive on-chain wallet profile returned by the Footprint Analytics Data API.

wallet_address.description: The blockchain wallet address that was queried.

native_balance.description: Balance in the chain's native token (e.g., ETH for Ethereum).

native_balance_usd.description: Native token balance converted to USD at current prices.

token_holdings.description: List of ERC-20 or equivalent token holdings.

nft_holdings_count.description: Total number of NFT tokens held across all collections.

defi_positions_count.description: Number of active DeFi protocol positions (LP, lending, staking, etc.).

transaction_count.description: Total number of on-chain transactions sent by this wallet.

first_tx_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the wallet's first ever on-chain transaction.

last_tx_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the wallet's most recent on-chain transaction.
